meta.title: Behind the Scenes Photoshop - "When it's the weekend" with Everyday Astronaut
meta.description:
Join me live every Friday at 1:00 p.m. Central (19 UTC) as I photoshop my Everyday Astronaut images on twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

Follow me on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut to see the final pictures!

What is Everyday Astronaut? Check out www.everydayastronaut.com for more info!
